confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.title: PR21 MMIO prefetch pipeline interference
confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.trigger: An existing normal cache pipeline request reaches the later stage while an MMIO prefetch appears in the front stage.
confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.verification: Real NutShell PR21 pre/fixed formal wrapper plus UCAgent/Toffee replay.

confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.title: PR74 CacheIO idBits elaboration/interface regression
confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.trigger: OOO-style Cache configuration requires request/response id fields, but pre-PR CacheIO omitted idBits.
confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.verification: Real NutShell PR74 pre elaboration failure plus fixed response-ID regression.

confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.title: L2 readBurst hit ready/valid deadlock candidate
confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.trigger: Same-address readBurst miss/refill followed by readBurst hit while L1 resp_ready is low.
confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.verification: Latest-upstream formal assert/cover plus public-IO dynamic replay and Toffee coverage.

ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.title: Flush while a miss is outstanding may expose stale-response bugs
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.trigger: Issue a read miss, hold memory response, assert flush, then release memory response.
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.verification: 05 declared closure uses an outstanding tracker; a future real-DUT formal property should be added if the public Cache flush contract is clarified.

ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.title: Dirty eviction writeback/refill ordering is a high-risk replacement corner
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.trigger: Dirty a line, force conflict replacement, and observe whether writeback precedes refill.
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.verification: 05 reference model closes the declared coverage bin; future work can bind the same oracle to a wider randomized real-DUT regression.

ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.title: Partial write masks can corrupt untouched bytes
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.trigger: Write alternating byte masks to a cached word and read back the untouched lanes.
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.verification: 05 byte-level scoreboard closes the declared partial-mask bin.
